overview: Lifestyle Spectrum is an anti-aging and regenerative medicine practice in Tucson offering bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, peptide therapy, PRP therapy, physician-supervised weight loss, and wellness coaching. The practice emphasizes individualized, one-on-one care aligned with each patient's health and lifestyle needs.
highlights: First Sottopelle® certified physician in Southwest Arizona
targetAudience: Adults in Tucson interested in anti-aging medicine, hormone balance, and wellness optimization.
